title: Intensely Energizing Canadian Duck Wrap
description: A flavorful and energizing wrap made with Canadian duck, silky herbs, and resinous spices, all wrapped in a pandan leaf.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Pat the duck breast dry with a paper towel and season with salt-free seasoning blend.
Add a small amount of avocado oil to the pan and sear the duck breast for 3 minutes per side.
Remove the duck from the pan and set aside to rest.
In the same pan, add the whisked maple syrup, ground ginger, and crushed black pepper.
Simmer the mixture for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally, until slightly thickened.
Add the fresh cilantro and chopped scallions to the pan and stir to combine.
Slice the rested duck breast into thin strips and add to the pan.
Stir in the rice vinegar and cook for an additional minute.
Warm the pandan leaf wrap in the microwave for 10-15 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by placing the duck mixture onto the center of the pandan leaf wrap.
Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap into a tight cylinder.
